semantic_description: In-place ASCII string lowercase conversion over a caller-owned char buffer. The input list l has length n, contains no zero bytes before the terminator, and the heap resource is CharArray::full(s, n + 1, app(l, cons(0, nil))). The function uses an unbounded while (1) scan with an explicit break when s[i] == 0; for each nonzero byte before the terminator, uppercase ASCII codes 65..90 are rewritten to code + 32 and other bytes are preserved. The postcondition requires an output list lr of the same length, per-index lowercase/preserve relation, nonzero prefix, and the same buffer ending in a zero terminator.
